title: fumaria capreolata subsp. media
intro: Fumaria capreolata subsp. media, also known as small corydalis or small fumewort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antitumor effects. The health benefits of Fumaria capreolata subsp. media include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and potentially inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
